calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-034 de-commit science falsifier WITH selection-face ceiling-lift ON (Move M1): 2x2 grid use_closure_commit_entry x lift {MECH-448 f_eligibility_demotion + MECH-449 Go/No-Go}; does the moderate-F regime the lift creates unblock BOTH MECH-445 commit-intent AND MECH-446 within-arm occupancy-drop co-occurrence?
items.note: Move M1 of REE_assembly/evidence/planning/claim_synthesis_MECH-445-446_2026-07-06.md. Re-runs the 715 SD-034 de-commit science falsifier (MECH-445 refractory-independent commit-intent + MECH-446 within-arm around-closure occupancy-drop co-occurrence, on the VALIDATED use_closure_commit_entry substrate) WITH the already-built selection-face conversion-ceiling lift TURNED ON: MECH-448 use_f_eligibility_demotion (VALIDATED V3-EXQ-689d PASS, promoted provisional) + MECH-449 use_go_nogo_constitution (VALIDATED V3-EXQ-689g PASS, promoted provisional; auto-wired MECH-260 perseveration axis, no OFC viability injection). HYPOTHESIS: MECH-448 removes F from the committed argmin (graded rank-preserving eligibility envelope), creating a MODERATE-F regime that is the norm across seeds, so MECH-445 arms on >=2/3 (not just the weak-F seed 44) AND MECH-446 gets a closure-driven occupancy to de-commit from -- unblocking BOTH children with ZERO new build. 2x2 arm grid (use_closure_commit_entry {OFF,ON} x lift {OFF,ON}) cloned from the same trained substrate (all three levers carry no trainable params): ARM_LIFT_OFF_ENTRY_ON reproduces 715's 1/3-arming failure IN-RUN; ARM_LIFT_ON_ENTRY_ON is the M1 science arm; ARM_LIFT_ON_ENTRY_OFF is the lift-on non-degeneracy contrast. NEW load-bearing readiness gate: MECH-448 demotion ENGAGEMENT (f_eligibility_excluded_count>0 via agent.e3.last_score_diagnostics) on >=2/3 seeds, guarding the 485i silent all-admit. M1 DIAGNOSTIC route_reasons answer the f_dominance_conversion_ceiling /implement-substrate owner's question 'does the selection-face lift double as the de-commit-release substrate?': lift_did_not_engage / lift_engaged_but_arming_still_regime_scoped / lift_engaged_arming_ok_but_window_starved (= a DISTINCT de-commit-release lever is owed) vs a clean PASS (= the lift DOUBLES AS the de-commit-release substrate). COORDINATION: the owner's plan-of-record (substrate_queue f_dominance_conversion_ceiling) records the selection-face and de-commit-release-DURATION faces as SEPARATE; M1 tests whether the selection-face's moderate-F side-effect delivers the arming-under-moderate-F precondition the 715 autopsy's implement-substrate route asked for. RE-DERIVE BRAKE RELEASED: MECH-445/446 have 6 prior substrate_ceiling autopsies (460h/i/j/k/l, 715); brake fired + 715 autopsy refused a same-selector re-queue, but (a) the named upstream substrate f_dominance_conversion_ceiling MECH-448 (689d PASS) + MECH-449 (689g PASS) is now BUILT+VALIDATED+PROMOTED-provisional (OFF in every prior iteration) and (b) the /claim-synthesis refusal record (the higher governance adjudication, 715 autopsy secondary route) ruled M1 explicitly brake-safe -- a NEW substrate CONFIGURATION, not a same-selector de-commit-MAGNITUDE re-derive (Sec.5/6). Sibling M2 = V3-EXQ-717 (MECH-445-only test-power sprint). SUPERSEDES V3-EXQ-715 (levers-OFF de-commit-science, self-routed substrate_not_ready at 1/3 arming; already scoring-excluded). MINT: in-run self-mint of the baseline arms (arm_cell, reuse-eligible); separate dedicated baseline mint SKIPPED -- disqualifier #2 (substrate genuinely in flux for this lineage: the OFF/baseline path re-tunes as the f_dominance_conversion_ceiling de-commit-release amend lands), matching sibling 717. experiment_purpose=evidence. PROMOTES NOTHING (MECH-445/446 stay candidate/v3_pending/pending_retest_after_substrate until reviewed + /governance applies). Smoke --dry-run PASS 2026-07-06: mechanism LIVE (demotion demote_eng 58/60 excl=1211, Go/No-Go gng=1211, lift_engaged=True -- NOT the 485i all-admit); routing + F-regime readouts + progress instrumentation verified; validate_experiments --strict OK; validate_queue OK.
items.machine_affinity_note: prefer cloud (linux-x86_64-py3.10); yield logic + scaler wake cloud workers to claim before DLAPTOP-4.local. No hardware requirement.

items.title: MECH-445-only commit-intent existence falsifier (regime-scoped, M2): 12 seeds, weak/strong-natural-commit classified from OFF-arm committed fraction, commit-intent counter scored only on the weak (in-regime) subset; MECH-446 gate dropped
items.note: Move M2 of REE_assembly/evidence/planning/claim_synthesis_MECH-445-446_2026-07-06.md. DECOUPLES the MECH-445 commit-INTENT existence claim from MECH-446 so MECH-445 can advance without waiting on the de-commit-release substrate. Based on v3_exq_715 but: (1) 12 seeds; (2) classify each seed weak/strong-natural-commit from its ARM_ENTRY_OFF F-driven committed fraction (weak iff committed_frac<=0.15); (3) score the refractory-independent commit-intent counter (sd034_n_closure_commit_intent) ONLY on the guard-passing WEAK (in-regime) subset, PASS if >0 on >=2/3 of THOSE; (4) MECH-446 co-occurrence / within-arm around-closure occupancy-drop gate DROPPED ENTIRELY. use_closure_commit_entry ON (ARM_ENTRY_ON). Fixes the 715 test-power hole: a 3-seed/2-of-3 gate (~1 in-regime) cannot certify a regime-scoped claim; 12 seeds (~4 in-regime) can. RE-DERIVE BRAKE RELEASED: MECH-445 has 6 prior substrate_ceiling autopsies (460h/i/j/k/l, 715) but (a) the named upstream substrate use_closure_commit_entry is BUILT+VALIDATED (V3-EXQ-460o/460p PASS 2026-06-24, present in ree_core/agent.py) and (b) this is a test-power redesign, not a same-selector de-commit-MAGNITUDE re-derive (the MECH-446 magnitude face the brake protects is dropped) -- brake-safe per claim_synthesis Sec.6. Does NOT supersede 715 (715 remains the MECH-446/co-occurrence record). Mint: in-run self-mint of the ARM_ENTRY_OFF baseline (arm_cell, reuse-eligible); separate dedicated baseline mint SKIPPED -- disqualifier #2 (substrate genuinely in flux for this lineage: the OFF path re-tunes as the f_dominance_conversion_ceiling amend lands). experiment_purpose=evidence. PROMOTES NOTHING (MECH-445 stays candidate/v3_pending/pending_retest_after_substrate until reviewed + /governance applies). Smoke --dry-run PASS 2026-07-06 (regime classifier verified: seed 42 committed_frac 0.353 -> strong, correctly excluded).
